Built for real decisions.
Not spreadsheets.

Communications for the Modern Age, Despite the Name.

Pancho Whampoa Signal & Telegraph is a one-person iOS studio building financial calculators that actually answer the question you came in with. Every app started as a personal spreadsheet for a real decision. Now they live in your pocket.

Available on the App Store

Straight answers to the questions dealers, lenders, and utilities hope you never ask.

⚡

Electricity Bill Calculator & Solar Payoff

Compare electricity plans side by side and calculate exactly when a solar installation pays for itself — based on your actual usage, rates, and incentives.

Mortgage Calculator
